plugins.name: agentic-os
plugins.description: Installer, doctor, and upgrade skills that scaffold a governed multi-agent architecture (agents, hooks, gates, policies, guides) into a target repo.

plugins.name: agentic-sdlc
plugins.description: Skill-first SDLC orchestrator: requirements -> spec -> plan -> TDD -> QA gates -> MR, with HITL/autonomous decision routing.

plugins.name: agentic-qe
plugins.description: Tool-agnostic AI blueprints for Quality Engineering across the STLC, with a scaffolder that turns a chosen blueprint into a ready-to-fill agent framework and an eval-framework generator for skills and agents.
